files.purpose: A centralized collection of nested mock data containing mails, calendars, notes, repos, media, messages, and configurations. Restricts component-level hardcoding.
Common TypeScript schema declarations, structures, and item interfaces to enforce compile-time verification across files.
The central OOP Workspace store managing deep reactive updates, local storage sync, callbacks, and calculating log-exponential volumetric bubble sizing.
State-management hooks (active folders, mail item selections, custom mail compose submission, folder archives) to isolate mail workspace logic.
Logic hooks tracking active storage filter selections, custom collection groups, item deletions, and progressive timer states for media migration.
Messaging workspace state machine handling active sub-channel selectors, chats delivery triggers, and custom simulated replies callbacks.
GitHub workspace selectors tracking highlighted respositories details, active status tabs, and open or closed issues sorting.
Interactive controller metrics mapping, active dashboards switching, and dynamic timeframe multiplier adjustments.
Pure text scratchpad editors tracking active items, edit buffer inputs, autosaves, matching searches, and deletions.
Calendar logic modeling year/month grid calculators (start days, offsets), details list highlights, and rapid schedule bookings.
A highly reusable, glazed frosted visual window implementing spring scaling transitions and blur refraction borders.
Clean, modular Mail presentation layout with folder sidebar navigation, split screens, and dynamic email compost forms.
Beautiful bento multimedia viewer rendering assets list, custom group assignments, and migration status progress bars.
Clean, interactive messaging presentation displaying threads sidebars, user response text fields, and live chat bubbles.
Visual representation of connected GitHub profiles rendering repo metadata cards, status tabs, and commits list.
SaaS analytics card layouts hosting responsive line-charts with glow effects powered by Recharts.
Searchable offline notepad layout supporting split-panes, autosave-on-edit textareas, and simple item creates.
Responsive grid display modeling dates, daily event badges, highlighted timelines, and custom scheduler inputs.
Credentials selector form allowing custom integrations setup utilizing API Keys and endpoint target URLs.
Definition of BaseBubble, WorkspaceBubble, and ChildSatelliteBubble classes to fulfill clean, extensible OOP bubble structures.
Interactive landing canvas containing ambient space glowing background, relative positionings, and outer child satellite expansion layers.
A modular, draggable, customizable node representing a single application workspace with staggered vibrations, micro-breathing motion, and curved child satellites.
Central shell layout holding high-refraction headers, notification tickers, home canvas, and dynamic modal workspace router.
